areas.currentStatus: controlled real-write implementation complete and hardened (symlink-through-file escape fixed, atomic temp-file-plus-rename writes): the controlled write executor is implemented, internally wired, and tested for test-owned fixture, copied config tree, and temporary config targets; write, byte-exact backup, restore, rollback, post-write reread verification, and post-restore reread verification are proven for all seven families against copied temp targets; the gated active-config pilot module exists with a fifteen-gate preflight, and the copied active-config rehearsal is proven against the real config content with the source untouched; the live pilot is blocked by the AutoreloadDisabledConfirmed and NoRuntimeMutationPlanned gates because misc:disable_autoreload is false on this system; a review-only GUI status card with a permanently insensitive Apply control is proven in the GTK evidence matrix; executor wired for controlled targets true; executor wired for active config false; real write path enabled for controlled targets true; real write path enabled for active config false; active real config writes approved false; GUI live Apply controls enabled false; hyprctl reload enabled false; runtime mutation enabled false; first real config write approved false; family runtime preview marathon: all seven families classified from live evidence, hl.animation and hl.curve promoted to supervised modify-existing preview by passed zero-residue proofs, four families blocked high-risk, gestures blocked without verification; pilot gate hardened with live autoreload evidence collection; SAFE LIVE SAVE SPRINT: the first active-config write pilot PASSED through its designed gated path using runtime-first autoreload control (write + byte-exact restore, no reload, SHA-verified); supervised family preview UI controls shipped for the two proven records; SAVE MARATHON: production Save integration complete (all scalar UI saves gated on Safe Live Save Mode), structured-family gated persistence implemented and live-flow-proven for both proven records (backup/write-once/reread-verify/no-restore-on-success), 0.55.4 migration audit complete with zero drift; COMPLETION MARATHON (record picker + safe mode persistence): a family record picker generalized gated persistence one proven record shape at a time - record-shape proofs passed live on non-family-proof records (hl.animation fade speed round trip; hl.curve quick control-point round trip, both zero residue), gated_family_record_save persists any explicitly overridden animation record speed (style preserved) and all four control points of any existing curve through the same gate chain (shape receipt + Safe Live Save Mode + identity + backup + one atomic write + reread verify), live save flow proofs passed with byte-exact flow-proof restores; disabled-at-runtime records were found unverifiable for preview by live proof and are save-only; inherited and internal records stay blocked (creation is blocked); Safe Live Save Mode can now be persisted (misc:disable_autoreload = true) through the gated scalar save, user-chosen, live-flow-proven UPDATE 2026-07-13 (RC marathon): animation record shapes expanded by live proofs - enabled (border 1->0->1, borderangle 0->1->0) and bezier (windows, existing curves only) join speed; combined AnimationRecordFields save gated on all three receipts; disabled records promoted to preview-supported; style blocked (no trusted value evidence); gestures blocked (no readback listing).
